events: Uburka accepts defeat and calls Death King 'Daddy'
Death King advises on peace negotiations - think from others' perspectives
Night of full moon meeting with all seven races
Uburka forces Fire River Council to vow to protect other races from extinction
Beats up 33 warriors who oppose, including ranked 6th
Offers oni commander personal help with rebellions in exchange for cooperation
Peace treaty signed by all seven races
cause_effect: Death King's advice to consider other races' perspectives leads to workable peace
Uburka's overwhelming strength forces compliance from his own race
Promising protection to all races removes their incentive to fight goblins
notes: Uburka's 'jjambap' comment - warriors who ate a lot of military meals. The oni commander gets his nose broken, horn bent, teeth knocked out, and buried upside down. Peace achieved through 'honorable duels.'

events: Flashback: 600 years of history after Great Escape
Mermaids evolve to withstand seawater, invent sea salt technology
Snails reject new ideology, call it devil worship
Six wars of supremacy break out, snail empire collapses
Rimepolis becomes last snail city - 'Holy Land'
Uburka offers three options for destroying city
944 snails challenge Uburka, all defeated by aura giant
Uburka destroys Rimepolis completely over half a day
Quest clears - goblin race gains Hegemon prestige
9000 race points reward
deaths: Many soldiers in wars over 600 years
cause_effect: Snails' inability to adapt mythology to new reality (sea salt) leads to ideological conflict
Mermaid technological innovation dooms snail salt monopoly
Uburka's strength makes him arbiter of peace
notes: The snail empire could have adapted by modifying mythology - 'Goddess split in half, half buried in ground, half sank in sea.' Their refusal to reform led to downfall. Death King receives 9800 total points.

events: Death King teaches Uburka Formation Method (group martial arts)
Teaches Infernal Heavens Demonic Art through dream torture
Starvation, freezing, burning, drowning, sickness deaths experienced in dreams
Explains basic formation method with stones - breaking enemy's rhythm cognition
Higher level: making aura resemble fire - 'when fantasy imposes itself on the world, it becomes real'
Shares 5 scenes: burning mansion, Preta, peony in winter, moon/mirror, rooftop tears
Uburka vows to spread stories as fire paintings and plays
Death King clears 33rd floor
cause_effect: Dream teaching allows experiencing multiple 'deaths' without dying
Formation method combines individual aura into group power
Shared emotional imagery allows coordinated aura usage
notes: The nine forms of Infernal Heavens: Starvation, Dehydration, Drowning, Freezing, Poison, Sickness, Blunt Force, Burning. Uburka endures 10 days of hell training in dreams.

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: Death King and Count meet in waiting room
Lady reveals Count was ELIMINATED on 33rd floor
Elf elders decided to surrender and become goblin vassals voluntarily
Elves only care about money, see no profit in fighting
Count's points distributed: only 2 points each to remaining hunters
Second Race Evolution costs 30,000 points - too expensive
300 years pass until next stage
cause_effect: Count taught elves to value money above all, which led them to surrender for profit
Elves became economic parasites rather than warriors
Count's elimination means Death King loses an ally
notes: The Count used up her points as she got them - only 13 points left to distribute. Elves planned to give goblins 1% profit while claiming 10% on double ledgers. The Count and Death King argue about parenting philosophy.

events: 34th floor - hunters separated into their own racial cities
Goblin city has become theater metropolis
Plays of Death King's life commercialized: 'Raviel and Kekerkker', 'Chronicles of Heavenly Demon'
Elves run ticket booths and theater businesses
Quest given: 'The Warring Theaters Period: The Crisis of Classics'
New generation tired of classic myths, recreations threaten original stories
16 denominations disputing doctrine
New trait: 'Demonic Cult'
Death King considers letting kids have fun, then sees Flame Emperor portrayed as good guy
Decides to fix the myths
cause_effect: Commercialization of myths led to reinterpretations that distort original meanings
If original myths disappear, goblins lose aura training method
Death King's stories became so popular they were commodified by elves
notes: Plays include: 'Raviel and Kekerkker', 'Demon King Estelle', 'Chronicles of Heavenly Demon', 'Esdel from Saintess to Witch'. The 'Raviel and Kekerkker' play is a scam - mostly about Silvia and Raviel, Death King dies.

events: Death King sees elf actor Ssonia rejected for being weak/elf
Decides to create a top star actor to restore true myths
Ssonia's family only cares about money, kicked him out with debt scrolls
Death King enters Ssonia's dream
Tests Ssonia by asking about Flame Emperor - Ssonia says he was a bastard
Purchases 'Person Possession' for 2000 points
Possesses Ssonia's body
Theater owner tests him with Raviel confession scene
Performs perfectly, gets hired
cause_effect: Ssonia's genuine belief that Flame Emperor was bad proves his artistic integrity
Person possession allows Death King to act directly through elf body
Theater owner's 'Kekerkker confession' test happens to be Death King's actual feelings
notes: Ssonia's family tracks every expense from birth in ledgers. The theater 'Mud and Dust' is 130 years old but filthy. The owner mistakes Death King's genuine love for Raviel as perfect acting.

events: Theater is filthy - spiders, centipedes, stagnant water
Three hobgoblin actors introduced: one-eyed Arika, one-armed Yumar, one-eared Sakum
Death King criticizes their acting as too stiff, following guides instead of feeling
Puts out torches with dirt and aura
Demonstrates emotions through pushups - normal speed vs unstable speed
Shows narcissistic Flame Emperor by doing slow pushups to admire muscles
Actors ask 'Who are you?'
cause_effect: Actors have been mimicking emotions rather than feeling them
Physical movement with genuine emotion creates better aura than scripted gestures
Death King's unconventional teaching shocks the actors
notes: The three actors each lost something: eye, arm, ear. Death King demonstrates 'refined anger' vs 'furious rage' through pushup speed. The narcissism demonstration uses chairs as props that Flame Emperor would ignore.

events: Death King takes complete control of theater
Forces actors to clean - 'bark like dogs' discipline
Renames theater 'Dog Sound Theater Company'
Uses cleaning as acting practice (absurdity, warrior duty)
Creates VIP seats priced 12x normal
Promotes on street with aura music (Chopstick March)
Promises first silent Fire Play - no lines, refund guarantee
VIP tickets sell out rapidly
cause_effect: Brutal discipline and cleaning improves theater environment and actor mindset
Aura music demonstration draws crowd attention
Scarcity marketing (VIP seats, limited shows) drives demand
notes: 'Dog Sound' (개소리) means bullsh*t in Korean. Death King learned professional smile from Black Dragon Master. VIP seats target warriors who want to learn aura techniques.

events: Death King explains Fire Plays originally had no lines - only aura
Teaches actors to recall specific memories, not just words
'Aura is triggered by memories, not will'
Actors share traumatic stories:
- Arika: didn't recognize his own mother, scowled at her
- Yumar: former drug lord, childhood friends betrayed him, took his arm
- Sakum: attendant whose ear was cut off for overhearing master's affair
'Let's dance, Seniors. We have a week.'
Performance day arrives, theater packed
cause_effect: Traumatic memories provide strongest aura fuel
Personal experiences allow authentic emotional expression
Silent performance will force audience to focus on aura rather than words
notes: Yumar's 'Juice of Heaven' and 'Powder of Scholars' drug brands. The drug organization grew to 500 members before council destroyed it. Arika's mother called him 'Mr. Arika' - formal distance.

events: Performance begins - actors create music with footsteps using aura
Death King enters as Flame Emperor, crawling like beast
Uses ancient goblin language: Swi-Rak-Gur
Blocks actors' voices with aura - silent play
Hunts actors like prey, aura flames engulf theater
Audience terrified - some faint, some run out
Security force storms in thinking it's real murder/arson
Actors explain it was just acting
Performance interrupted
cause_effect: Performance is so realistic audience believes it's real violence
Security interruption actually creates massive publicity
Death King's aura control can simulate fire, block sound, create music simultaneously
notes: The Flame Emperor's monologue: 'Only I am a person.' Five people reported murder simultaneously. Ranked 21st council member Morkan is in audience. Actors from rival theaters [Flame] and [Fire Demon] also attending.

events: Security force embarrassed by mistake
Actors furious about interruption at climax
Death King turns situation into marketing opportunity
Invites security force to next show for free - 'small apology fee'
Uses puppy eyes technique learned from Raviel
Audience demands next performance tickets
Announces secret special performance next Saturday for today's attendees only
Makes audience shout 'Flame Emperor you son of a bitch' to get tattoos
Heretic erosion rate drops to 86%
[Returning to Ancient Times] gaining popularity
cause_effect: Security force incident becomes free publicity - 'so real it was reported'
Inviting security force ensures future performances won't be interrupted
Making audience insult Flame Emperor reinforces correct narrative
notes: Security force motto: 'Blocking beforehand is more beneficial than judging afterward.' Death King's tattoo pattern is a dog - promotes theater while mocking Flame Emperor.

events: Dog Sound Theater becomes legendary - multiple sold-out shows
Heretic erosion rate drops from 86% to 28%
Death King trains 24-member dance troupe with martial arts choreography
Considers retiring from Ssonia's body
Black Dragon Master appears as old vampire - completed her quest
Watches practice, calls it amazing
Next day brings Crusader (as mermaid in bathtub) via teleportation
Crusader is furious about being seen as mermaid
cause_effect: Restoring original myths through theater strengthens goblin cultural identity
Black Dragon Master's interest suggests aura art has broader applications
Crusader's musical background will enhance the art form
notes: Plays in repertoire: 'Burning Grave' (Tower 10th floor background), 'Demon King Estelle'. Black Dragon Master's vampire form is old man with black suit, gold cane, silver ring. Crusader's mermaid form has gills and flatfish-like tail.

events: Crusader explains Death King created 'composite art' with aura
Music, dance, acting all produced by actors themselves via aura
This is revolutionary - no need for external musicians
Black Dragon Master wants to promote nationally, make Death King art guild leader
Crusader reveals she was jazz musician 'Night Sky' before Tower
Black Dragon Master writes/publishes anonymously
They flatter Death King excessively until he accepts guild leader position
Black Dragon Master gives him seal, says money will appear in account
cause_effect: Crusader's musical expertise validates Death King's innovation as genuine art revolution
Black Dragon Master's outside-world resentment drives desire for cultural export
Excessive flattery is manipulation tactic to get Death King to accept leadership role
notes: Crusader's real past: Venezuelan refugee, music school graduate, earned money from jazz concerts. Black Dragon Master's anonymous writing is her secret. The 'Night Sky' nickname. Death King becomes unwitting founder of 'Aura Art' movement.
